case_title: DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD. VS. JINTANA HUFF et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF MONEY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUFF, JINTANA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS QUEEN TOUR TRAVEL INTERNATIONAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 391 SUTTER ST. SUITE 807, S.F. CA. 94108, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD. AS TO DEFENDANT HUFF, JINTANA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS QUEEN TOUR TRAVEL INTERNATIONAL DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF MONEY JUDGMENT AND JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD.
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD.
DECLARATION RE DEFUALT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD. SERVED AUG-24-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUFF, JINTANA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS QUEEN TOUR TRAVEL INTERNATIONAL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT HUFF, JINTANA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS QUEEN TOUR TRAVEL INTERNATIONAL
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HUFF, JINTANA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS QUEEN TOUR TRAVEL INTERNATIONAL
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT HUFF, JINTANA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS QUEEN TOUR TRAVEL INTERNATIONAL
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT HUFF, JINTANA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS QUEEN TOUR TRAVEL INTERNATIONAL
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT HUFF, JINTANA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS QUEEN TOUR TRAVEL INTERNATIONAL
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HUFF, JINTANA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS QUEEN TOUR TRAVEL INTERNATIONAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUFF, JINTANA INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS QUEEN TOUR TRAVEL INTERNATIONAL $10,261.43 PRINCIPAL, $2,520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $689.23 INTEREST, $660.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,130.96, INTEREST ACCRUES AT THE LEGAL RATE FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UNTIL PAID. (POSSESSION OF THE PROPERTY AT 391 SUTTER STREET, #807, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA WAS RESTORED ON SEPTEMBER 22, 2004.) SEE SCANNED DOC
